  • Inj3_2 ∷ b → Sum3 a b c
  • Inj3_3 ∷ c → Sum3 a b c
name: Sum3 Inj3_3 Inj3_2 Inj3_1

display_html: foo_ ∷ Term (Sum3 a b c) → Term a
name: foo_

display_html: bar_ ∷ Term (Sum3 a b c) → Term (Either b c)
name: bar_

display_html: guardSum3 ∷ ∀ a b c. (HasSpec a, HasSpec b, HasSpec c) ⇒ Spec a → Spec (Either b c) → Spec (Sum3 a b c)
name: guardSum3

display_html: coerce_ ∷ Term (E3 a b c) → Term (Either a (Either b c))
name: coerce_

display_html: newtype E3 a b c = E3 (Either a (Either b c))
name: E3 E3
